[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0010000100 2
3 0000000000 a
4 0000001010 2
5 1000001000 2
6 0011001100 4
7 0111100111 7

01 10 0111100111 7 match 7
12 21 0010001010 3
23 32 1010001110 5
34 43 1111001100 6
45 54 0111011111 8
56 65 1100011111 7
67 76 1011011101 7
70 07 1111101111 9

02 20 0111101111 8
13 31 1010001100 4
24 42 0111001110 6
35 53 1110011111 8
46 64 1111011101 8
57 75 1111011111 9
60 06 1111111111 a
71 17 1011001101 6

03 30 1111101111 9
14 41 0111001100 5
25 52 0110011111 7
36 63 1010011101 6
47 74 1111001101 7
50 05 0111111111 9
61 16 1000011001 4
72 27 1011001111 7

04 40 0111101111 8
15 51 0100011111 6
26 62 1010011011 6
37 73 1011001101 6
[completion]
0 absent
1 absent
2 absent

4 absent

none

01 70x
